title: PRP and McKenzie Exercise For PLID
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4c6l","text":"This protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial comparing intradiscal platelet‑rich plasma (PRP) combined with a 4‑week McKenzie exercise program versus McKenzie therapy alone for treating L5/S1 lumbar disc herniation. The study evaluates pain (VAS, PPTs), disc morphology (MSK‑USG), neurophysiology (SLR, NCS, EMG), and disability (ODI) over 1, 3, and 6 months. Expected results include superior reductions in pain, improved disc height and echogenicity, enhanced neurophysiological outcomes, and lower disability scores in the PRP‑McKenzie group. If successful, this combined intervention could accelerate symptom relief and functional recovery, potentially reducing surgical referrals and prolonged medication use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"c2lq1","text":"Autologous blood collection kit","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dd40p","text":"Double-spin centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e5v37","text":"22G Quincke Chiba spinal needle (8-inch)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"24pmq","text":"Ultrasound machine with high-frequency linear probe","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"92p48","text":"Sterile syringes (5 mL, 10 mL), saline, gloves, drapes, antiseptic","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5n5rr","text":"Musculoskeletal ultrasound (MSK-USG) equipment","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39oer","text":"Electromyography (EMG) and Nerve Conduction Study (NCS) system","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fv4vn","text":"Visual Analog Scale (VAS) forms","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dp38c","text":"Pressure algometer (for PPT)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"93ac3","text":"Oswestry Disability Index (ODI) questionnaire","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"464ua","text":"McKenzie exercise instruction sheets and therapy bed","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
